hypothesis_long: EXTREME SELECTIVITY: enter ONLY top-decile conviction AND >=4 confluence factors agree; survivor structure (ITM-2, -8% premium stop, v15 exits); real OPRA fills. Does ruthless selectivity clear?
spy_vs_option: SPY-direction confluence != option edge (C3/L58); this IS the option-edge test
verdict: FAILS -- extreme selectivity does NOT clear. Failed gates: ['G7_no_sign_inversion_at_chartstop']. Consistent with the confluence engine's on-record verdict (awareness, not alpha; theta trap as a trigger). Selectivity narrows N but does not manufacture option edge.

DISCLOSURE.per_trade: per-trade expectancy reported, not WR alone (OP-14)
